commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml for @typescript/native-preview and its platform packages, while the lockfile also moves date-fns, react-hook-form, react-resizable-panels, and related snapshots.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: the diff itself shows unrelated runtime lockfile changes alongside the intended @typescript/native-preview bump. No runtime bug reproduction is needed to identify that scope mismatch.
commands.review_followup: A focused repair can mechanically narrow the lockfile and validate the dev-tool dependency update without a product decision.
